headline: Judge SLAPS ICE рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ҙ for Bunny-Hat Toddler CUFFS рҹҳӯрҹҗ°рҹ•·пёҸ
text:
MINNEAPOLIS рҹҸҷпёҸвқ„пёҸ SPIDEY-BACKPACK рҹ•·пёҸрҹҺ’ PRE-SCHOOLER LIAM CONEJO RAMOS рҹҗ°рҹ‘Ұ (rockin' that FLUFFY BLUE BUNNY HAT рҹҗҮрҹ’ҷ like a tiny Easter boss рҹҘҡрҹҳҚ) got YANKED рҹҳұрҹҡ” from his DRIVEWAY рҹҸ рҹҡ— by ICE THUGS рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ”’, sparking a NATIONAL MELTDOWN рҹӨ¬рҹ“ўрҹ’Ҙ! Daddy ADRIAN ALEXANDER CONEJO ARIAS рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘Ұ fled ECUADOR рҹҢҙрҹҮӘрҹҮЁ in 2024 for ASYLUM рҹҶҳвңҲпёҸ, followin' ALL the PROTOCOLS рҹ“ңвң… like good bois, but TRUMP'S OP METRO SURGE рҹҡҖрҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ј RAMMED 'em into TEXAS JAIL рҹҸ°рҹ”’ San Antonio style! ICE SIMPS рҹӨЎрҹҡ« whined 'We didn't TARGET the KID рҹ‘¶, just nabbed DAD the ILLEGAL ALIEN рҹ‘Ҫрҹҡ« who DITCHED his spawn рҹҳў' вҖ“ BRUH, you LEFT a 5YO CRYING on the PORCH? рҹҳӯрҹҸ рҹ’Ұ

Enter HERO JUDGE FRED BIERY рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ–пёҸрҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ (Clinton appointee рҹ’ҷрҹ‘‘) DROPPING the HAMMER вҡ’пёҸрҹ’Ҙ in EMERGENCY RULING рҹ“ңрҹ”Ҙ: RELEASE 'em by FEB 3 рҹ—“пёҸвҸ° or ELSE! Judge YEETED a PIC рҹ“ёрҹҗ° of bunny Liam in his order, ROASTING рҹ‘Ҡ ICE's 'PERFIDIOUS LUST FOR UNBRIDLED POWER рҹӨ‘рҹ”ҘрҹҳҲ' and 'ILL-CONCEIVED DEPORT QUOTAS рҹ“Ҡрҹҡ« TRAUMATIZING TOTS рҹ‘¶рҹҳ°!' Straight fire рҹ”Ҙрҹ“ў: 'CRUELTY knows NO BOUNDS рҹӨ¬рҹ’”, even for SPIDEY FANS рҹ•·пёҸрҹ•ёпёҸ!' Called for ORDERLY HUMAN POLICY вңҠвқӨпёҸ over this QUOTA ORGY рҹ’Ұрҹ“Ҳ of KID-CUFFING CHAOS!

FAM LAWYER MARC PROKOSCH рҹ’јрҹӣЎпёҸ spilling TEA вҳ•: 'They in SAN ANTONIO SLAMMER рҹҸ°рҹҳ©, but WE WON рҹҸҶ!' Meanwhile, TRUMP CREW рҹҚҠрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹ’Ҙ hyped MINNEAPOLIS FED FORCE SURGE рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡҖ but BACKPEDALED рҹҗҢрҹ”„ after SHOOTING OUTRAGE рҹҳЎрҹ”«рҹ’Җ of TWO US CITS вҖ“ now JUDGE BLOCKED STATE'S PLEA рҹҷ…вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ“ң to YEET the AGENTS! DHS GHOSTED BBC рҹ‘»рҹ“ұ, but Judge Biery said HOLD MY GAVEL рҹ”Ё: NO MORE BABY JAILS рҹҚјрҹҡ«! Liam's SPIDEY SENSE рҹ•·пёҸрҹ•ёпёҸ tinglin' for FREEDOM рҹҰ…вңЁ вҖ“ ICE CUCKED рҹҗ”рҹҳ©, toddler TRIUMPHS рҹҸ…рҹ‘¶! Puns on point: This OP was a BUNNY HOP рҹҳӨрҹҗ° straight to COURT CLAPBACK рҹ‘Ҹрҹ’Ҙ! #FreeLiam #IceMelt рҹ§Ҡрҹ”Ҙ
